name: Wightprince
desc: If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Skull Servant" and 1 "The Lady in Wight" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY. You can banish 2 "Skull Servant(s)" and this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "King of the Skull Servants" from your Deck. This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY.
mnst_eff: If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Skull Servant" and 1 "The Lady in Wight" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY. You can banish 2 "Skull Servant(s)" and this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "King of the Skull Servants" from your Deck. This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY.
eff: If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Skull Servant" and 1 "The Lady in Wight" from your hand and/or Deck to the GY. You can banish 2 "Skull Servant(s)" and this card from your GY; Special Summon 1 "King of the Skull Servants" from your Deck. This card's name becomes "Skull Servant" while in the GY.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
stat_change: Changes own name while in the GY
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
